textByHash.cabca66fc19b69d9e2e3e48cd847e6189df49eea: 'Ello, and what are you after then?
textByHash.f806ce46b46fef1cc84c11381e4b7777ef2804f4: Indeed I am. It's been a while since he last asked me to step in, but it's good to get out and see the sights, to meet mortals and to generally socialise.
textByHash.4d0508b3a7b8beefc0e8920dedd8d4687a9d1c6f: Oh, yes, he's such a mine of information. He hears what's going on at the pub, listens to the gossip of passing adventurers, and now he's off on a great adventure himself.
textByHash.20cf35046765da27b337a7df5a3964e2baf56fef: Though, of course, you know that already. Sorry to babble on. I'm sure you have plenty of other things to be doing.
textByHash.24c3969bacee324cbf15acb3a938f76df21e5c7a: You're actually very strong, are you sure you don't want Vannaka under Edgeville to assign you a task?
textByHash.7b172d997a7cfbf48b6c2eb5c2e7d4f760a1fcc5: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill .
textByHash.f3aa839fa0cd64749527916f22edb1e796c115ea: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.
textByHash.b53aa2358d85a832f40919a7961648af35214402: You're still hunting , you have to go. Come back when you've finished your task.
textByHash.e81f713b73d0c12d2f9cefbb81e6b44f1367b13d: You're still hunting , with to go.
textByHash.2d898591aa17e44eb9f3da32c2911ab6fe5031e0: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.
textByHash.4690813fc8fa29e4a7a15380409b6987d0454188: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.
textByHash.3936915ec951a366ea891abbd6196e29203cad0a: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.
textByHash.c0dcd9325e7ced3243a9d9d8c6771fbe5de4c8db: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.
textByHash.1cd9bdb2d0b412718114a85d06ea7585b9c1aee5: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHash.0e0b6ccc4a67de673135b9a90e4e5b040b7f149c: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.
textByHash.47f277169b556d3646c41d8aa3ba877ceee4adb1: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.
textByHash.dbd53e5f1c3835c46583db9ab8096068eaee8d1f: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.
